name: Fidelity Investments
overview_text: Fidelity Investments is a leading provider of investment management and retirement savings services. It offers a range of investment products, investment advice, brokerage services, and retirement services to individuals, businesses, and institutions.

description: Fidelity Investments is a leading provider of investment management and retirement savings services. It offers a range of investment products, investment advice, brokerage services, and retirement services to individuals, businesses, and institutions.
vision_statement: To create a world where everyone can thrive financially.
mission_statement: To transform lives through world-class financial services and guidance.

core_values.Integrity: Act with integrity, transparency, and accountability.
core_values.Customer Focus: Put our customers at the center of everything we do.
core_values.Innovation: Foster a culture of innovation and continuous improvement.
core_values.Teamwork: Collaborate and empower each other to achieve excellence.
core_values.Accountability: Take ownership and be accountable for our actions and results.

sales_motion: Fidelity Investments offers a range of financial products and services, including brokerage accounts, retirement accounts, and investment management services.
exit_strategy_history: Fidelity has a history of successful acquisitions and divestitures, including the sale of its retail brokerage business to Charles Schwab in 2021.
carbon_footprint: Fidelity has set a goal to achieve net-zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2050 and has made significant progress in reducing its carbon footprint through the use of renewable energy and energy-efficient technologies.
ethical_sourcing: Fidelity has a commitment to responsible investing and sourcing, and has implemented policies and procedures to ensure that its investments and operations are conducted in an ethical and sustainable manner.
benchmark_vs_peers: Fidelity consistently ranks among the top investment management companies in terms of performance and customer satisfaction.
industry_associations: Fidelity is a member of various industry associations, including the Securities Industry and Financial Markets Association (SIFMA) and the Investment Company Institute (ICI).
case_studies: Fidelity has a number of case studies available that demonstrate its expertise and capabilities in areas such as investment management, retirement planning, and financial planning.
sustainability_csr: Fidelity has a strong commitment to sustainability and corporate social responsibility, and has implemented a number of initiatives to reduce its environmental impact and promote social responsibility.
crisis_behavior: Fidelity has a crisis management plan in place to ensure that it is prepared to respond quickly and effectively in the event of a crisis or emergency.
